category_sources: source_facts.description says document viewer for PDF and other formats; official Apps for GNOME page says Document Viewer reads PDF, DjVu, TIFF, and comic archives.
display_name_sources: Official Apps for GNOME page displays the app name as Document Viewer for Papers.
docs_sources: Official GNOME help page is Papers Document Viewer Help.
repo_sources: Official Welcome to GNOME page links the Papers code repository to GNOME GitLab.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Apps for GNOME/help pages list document viewing, PDF/DjVu/TIFF support, GNOME desktop, and annotations.
